combineHits.description: Combines an array of HitResults into a single HitResult with a single position and normal on which the hit occurred.

HitResult.description: Contains data about a hit returned by a collision query.

members.depth: For collisions checking for overlaps, this how much the hit overlapped.
members.distance: The distance in units before a hit occurred.
members.impactPoint: The point in 3D space where the hit occurred
members.normal: The normal of the point that was hit, pointing away from the hit surface.

getHitObject.description: Returns the object that was hit.

PhysicsManager.description: A physics context that represents the collision of a 3D scene.

isActive.description: True if the physics manager is active and updating. When false, collision and physics are disabled for this scene.

rayCast.description: Does a ray collision check from the start point to the end point and returns the first hit that occurred.

arguments.start: The start position of the ray.
arguments.end: The end position of the ray.
arguments.layer: THe layer on which the collision check occurs.
arguments.ignoredObjects: Objects that should be ignored when casting the ray.

rayCast.return: Returns a HitResult describing the hit that occurred, or null if no collider was hit.
